# Timeline of Major Theories {#timeline-major-theories}

## Purpose

A chronological timeline of key theories, discoveries, and publications relevant to the life-consciousness relationship.

---

## Ancient and Classical Period

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| ~600 BCE | Thales: all matter is alive (hylozoism) |
| ~500 BCE | Democritus: soul atoms and materialism |
| ~400 BCE | Plato: the World Soul (*Timaeus*) |
| ~350 BCE | Aristotle: *De Anima*, the scale of souls |
| ~250 CE | Plotinus: Neoplatonic emanation theory |

## Early Modern Period

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| 1641 | Descartes: *Meditations*, substance dualism |
| 1677 | Spinoza: *Ethics*, dual-aspect monism |
| 1714 | Leibniz: *Monadology*, panpsychism |
| 1781 | Kant: *Critique of Pure Reason*, limits of knowledge |

## 19th Century

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| 1859 | Darwin: *On the Origin of Species* |
| 1871 | Darwin: *The Descent of Man* (animal consciousness) |

## 20th Century

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| 1929 | Whitehead: *Process and Reality* |
| 1944 | Schrödinger: *What Is Life?* |
| 1953 | Watson and Crick: DNA structure |
| 1953 | Miller-Urey experiment |
| 1972 | Maturana and Varela: autopoiesis |
| 1974 | Nagel: "What is it like to be a bat?" |
| 1988 | Baars: Global Workspace Theory |
| 1993 | Kauffman: *The Origins of Order* |
| 1994 | Penrose: *Shadows of the Mind* (Orch-OR) |
| 1995 | Chalmers: "Facing up to the problem of consciousness" |
| 1996 | Hameroff and Penrose: Orch-OR formalized |

## 21st Century

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| 2004 | Tononi: Integrated Information Theory (IIT) |
| 2006 | Friston: Free Energy Principle |
| 2010 | Dehaene: Global Neuronal Workspace |
| 2015 | Goff: panpsychism revival |
| 2016 | Feinberg and Mallatt: *Ancient Origins of Consciousness* |
| 2019 | Kastrup: analytic idealism |
| 2020 | Cronin and Walker: assembly theory |
| 2023 | Adversarial collaboration results (GWT vs IIT) |
| 2024 | Birch: *The Edge of Sentience* |

[Update as new developments occur]
